THE APPROVAL OF THE ABS CLASSIFICATIONS MANAGER, TEL (02) 6252 5409, IS REQUIRED WHERE THE TOTAL VALUE OF THE ENTRY UNDER THIS CODE WILL EXCEED $200,000. GOODS REQUIRING A PERMIT SHOULD NOT BE CLASSIFIED TO THIS AHECC, BUT SHOULD BE CLASSIFIED BY KIND. THE EXCEPTIONS ARE GOODS REQUIRING AN AQIS OR HORTICULTURE AUSTRALIA PERMISSION AND FIRST AID KITS.
